content.claim: A 2019 study cited by the current minister documents that parents preparing children for 8- and 6-grade gimnázium entrance exams invested on average 3.5 hours per week and 34,000 forints per month in exam preparation, with almost exclusive admission of children of university-educated parents.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Hungarian education system lens
limitations: Original source document not independently retrieved
Study does not quantify the causal contribution of parental investment versus student ability in determining admission
Investment figures are average; distribution and selection mechanism not detailed
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
